1951:36BD.label: clear_offscreen_buffer
1951:36BD.comment: Clear offscreen sprite staging buffer at ES:0x4A40 (cx=0x8880 bytes), then blit to screen via sprite_render_pass1.

1951:397E.label: render_frame
1951:397E.comment: Main per-frame render entry. Calls clear_offscreen_buffer then iterates sprite list at DS:0x10EB calling sprite_dispatch for each active entry.

1951:46E3.label: palette_scanline_split
1951:46E3.comment: Palette split for game area vs status bar. Waits for vsync rising edge, waits for vsync falling edge, writes first palette via palette_load_dac, then spin-waits ~60 hsyncs before writing second palette. The 60-hsync delay positions the palette boundary at the status bar scan line. In EGA Mode 10h this is ~60/364 of a frame; emulator CGA timing (262 lines) shifts this boundary downward.

1951:4C4D.label: flip_display_buffer
1951:4C4D.comment: Double-buffer flip. Loads render buffer base from [DS:0x1F76], passes it to crtc_set_start_address so the CRTC begins displaying the just-rendered frame, then swaps [0x1F76] and [0x1F78] so the next render targets the opposite buffer.

1951:4C63.label: crtc_set_start_address
1951:4C63.comment: Hardware scroll: writes CRTC start address high byte to reg 0x0C and low byte to reg 0x0D via port 0x3D4/0x3D5.

1951:4E1C.label: clear_vram
1951:4E1C.comment: Clear full VRAM for Mode 10h (EGA 640x350 16-color planar). cx=0x6D60=28000=80 bytes/row*350 rows. Sets di=0 then falls through to vga_reg_setup_and_clear.

1951:4E25.label: vga_reg_setup_and_clear
1951:4E25.comment: Configure VGA GC for full-plane clear then rep stosb to 0xA000:DI for CX bytes. Sets Enable Set/Reset=0x0F (all 4 planes receive set/reset value 0), Bit Mask=0xFF.

1951:5356.label: palette_vsync_wait
1951:5356.comment: Spin-wait for vertical sync before DAC palette update to avoid palette tearing.

1951:542B.label: palette_load_dac
1951:542B.comment: Load 16 RGB palette entries from dac_palette (DS:0x5534) into VGA DAC via ports 0x3C8/0x3C9. Each entry is 3 bytes of 6-bit R, G, B.

1951:7C94.label: sprite_dispatch
1951:7C94.comment: Per-sprite render dispatcher. Called for each active sprite in the list.

1951:8838.label: sprite_render_pass1
1951:8838.comment: EGA sprite pass 1 (shape mask). Sets Map Mask=0x0F (all planes), Enable Set/Reset=0x0E (force planes 1-3 to 0, plane 0 = CPU data). Latches background via dummy read, writes glyph through GC Bit Mask. After this pass sprite pixels have planes 1-3 zeroed while background retains bright colors (plane 3=1). Stores render buffer base address from DX into [DS:0x1F76]; all sprite writes are offset from this base.

1951:8852.label: sprite_render_pass1_setup
1951:8852.comment: Pass 1 per-sprite setup (127 calls). Adds render buffer base [DS:0x1F76] to BX to get absolute VRAM destination for this sprite, then calls sprite_render_pass1_blit.

1951:8950.label: sprite_render_pass1_blit
1951:8950.comment: Pass 1 blit core. For each glyph byte: set GC Bit Mask to glyph byte, latch background at ES:DI, lodsb/stosb to write through mask.

1951:8B84.label: sprite_render_pass2
1951:8B84.comment: EGA sprite pass 2 (color fill). Sets GC Mode=0x08 (Read Mode 1 / Write Mode 0), Data Rotate=0x10 (OR ALU), Color Compare=0x08 (match plane 3=1), Color Don't Care=0x08 (only check plane 3). Read Mode 1 returns pixels where background plane 3=1; inverted mask restricts writes to sprite-shape pixels (plane 3=0). NOISE CAUSE: after a fresh clear all planes are 0, so plane 3=0 everywhere, pass 2 sees the entire screen as sprite area and floods it with sprite color instead of only filling the sprite shape.

1951:448A.label: main_game_loop
1951:448A.comment: Main per-frame loop (36 iterations captured). Each iteration: wait vsync via palette_scanline_split, call render_frame to draw all sprites to back buffer, call flip_display_buffer to swap CRTC start address.

1951:46AA.label: intro_fade_loop
1951:46AA.comment: Outer intro/fade-in loop (40 iterations). Exits when mouse button or key is detected (bit 0-2 of [DS:0x0014]). Each iteration calls palette_scanline_split to animate the palette.

1951:89C3.label: pass1_plane_shift
1951:89C3.comment: Hot rcr chain (20470 calls): shr [si],1 extracts a pixel bit into CF; chain of rcr [si+N],1 across 8-9 bytes propagates CF through all bytes, converting packed pixel data to EGA bit-serial plane format.

1951:89D3.label: pass1_plane_shift_b
1951:89D3.comment: Second rcr chain variant (20470 calls) for alternate byte grouping in sprite plane conversion.

1951:89E5.label: pass1_inner_loop
1951:89E5.comment: Pass 1 inner pixel loop (6702 calls). Iterates sprite glyph bytes with GC Bit Mask set per byte.

1951:8C02.label: pass2_inner_loop
1951:8C02.comment: Pass 2 hot inner loop (18401 calls). Reads ES:DI in Read Mode 1 (color-compare result: plane 3=1 pixels), inverts to get sprite-shape mask, sets GC Bit Mask, writes sprite color via lodsb/stosb.

22FD:5534.label: dac_palette
22FD:5534.comment: VGA DAC palette: 16 entries x 3 bytes (6-bit R, G, B). Written to hardware by palette_load_dac.

22FD:10EB.label: sprite_list
22FD:10EB.comment: Active sprite table. Iterated by render_frame; each entry passed to sprite_dispatch.
